posts.name: QWERTYS
posts.tagline: My keyboard fell apart. Now it's your problem.
posts.description: The keyboard fell apart, stack it back together. Tetris meets QWERTY.t's Tetris, except the blocks are keys and every single one has exactly one home. Drop the A on the A. The Z on the Z. You get it. Miss the spot, and that key turns into a useless gray brick that just sits there, bothering you until you explode it. Stack them right and the keyboard lights up blue, row by row, until the whole thing is whole again. Stack them wrong long enough and the junk piles to the top and it's over.

Connect Destiny 2, Diablo III, Hearthstone, World of Warcraft, StarCraft II, Dota 2, Team Fortress 2, Steam, and Stoat to automate the parts of gaming that eat up your time. Whether you're tracking Steam achievements, staying on top of Hearthstone releases, or making sure you never miss Xur, it all runs once connected. Even your Diablo III hardcore hero's death won't go undocumented. Hook it all up to Discord, Slack, Google Sheets, and more.

posts.description: WOPA is a WhatsApp invoicing assistant for UK tradespeople. Message it like “Invoice Chris £850 for rewire” and WOPA drafts a PDF invoice, lets you review it, emails it to your customer, tracks what’s outstanding, and helps chase unpaid invoices. Customers get a normal email; you stay in WhatsApp. WOPA remembers all your customers when you need it.

posts.tagline: Stop your AI agent drifting, flattering, and fabricating.

One API call returns an engineered cognitive operation: the failure to avoid, a procedure, the shortcuts to suppress, a self-check it must pass. 679 across four harnesses (reasoning, code, anti-deception, memory), via a hosted MCP and 13 integrations. New in this launch: adaptive mode tailors the operation to your exact task, rewriting every reasoning step to fit the problem in front of you instead of a dynamic matched cognitive op.

posts.name: Manifesto Page

posts.name: HermesMarkdown

posts.tagline: A private, encrypted newborn tracker with no accounts
posts.description: Paige keeps track of the feeds, the nappies and what happened while you were asleep, so you don't have to hold it all in your head. No accounts, end-to-end encrypted, beautifully designed and easy to use.

Paste SEED.md into your coding agent and it builds the whole app from scratch, verifies every feature works, and deploys YOUR own instance on your accounts. Not a template — intent. Open source, on the open SEED format. When code is cheap, the spec is the asset.

posts.name: Webstorio
posts.tagline: AI Web Builder Platform with Everything Built-in
posts.description: Webstorio is an AI Web Builder Platform with Everything Built-in. Generate a website from a prompt, customize it visually, manage content with a built-in CMS, and use integrated authentication, payments, SEO, analytics, hosting, and more. All in one platform. Build faster. Maintain with confidence.

posts.name: Bleenk
posts.tagline: Idea in. Live, production-ready app out.
posts.description: Most "AI app builders" stop at a pretty prototype you can't ship. Bleenk takes you the whole way, from prompt to a deployed, production-ready app: real backend, database, auth, and live hosting included. No setup, no dev team, no copy-pasting between tools. Under the hood, coordinated agents plan, build, test, and deploy on infrastructure from Google Cloud, Neon, E2B, and DigitalOcean, so what you get is a running product, not a demo.

posts.name: OmegaGPT
posts.tagline: Fast, Free AI Chat - 100% Offline
posts.description: OmegaGPT is a fast, private AI chat that works 100% offline. No cloud, no internet, no data worries. Ask anything, anytime - even without signal. Works on your device, free to use, secure. Available for iOS and Android.

posts.name: Snoozify
posts.tagline: Mix ambient sounds with your own music to sleep & focus
posts.description: Most sleep apps loop the same fixed tracks until you tune them out. Snoozify lets you build your own soundscape instead: layer rain, fire, ocean, wind, white and brown noise, and blend in your own music, then tune each channel to taste. Save your mixes, start from presets like Zen Garden or Deep Focus, and set a sleep timer. Made for falling asleep, winding down, and focusing while you work. iOS, free to start, with optional sound packs.

posts.name: Loglens
posts.tagline: One line of code, Full AI visibility.
posts.description: LogLens is an LLM observability platform built for developers shipping AI products. Add one line of code and every call your app makes to Anthropic or OpenAI gets logged automatically, full prompt, completion, latency, token count, cost, and errors. No proxy setup, no framework lock-in, works with both TypeScript and Python. Built-in cost alerts email you before your bill explodes. Error tracking shows failed calls in red with the exact error type. Free tier, no credit card required.

posts.name: Jda Programming Language
posts.tagline: opensource compiler ai faster
posts.description: A self-hosted systems programming language built from scratch — zero C, zero Rust. Bootstrapped from assembly.

posts.name: ONYRI Sanitize
posts.tagline: Get the most out of AI without handing them your data.
posts.description: Most AI-privacy tools redact on their servers — your data still leaves your machine. ONYRI Sanitize doesn't: detection, masking and restoration run 100% in your browser, and the token↔value mapping never touches a server. 0 bytes of sensitive data ever leave. What stands out: • Reversible tokens, not black boxes — the AI keeps context; you restore values in place • 38 detectors, 6 families: names to API keys, salaries to cloud secrets • Text, CSV/Excel + built-in Chat for GPT, Claude & Mistram

posts.name: Social & Utility Suite
posts.tagline: A serverless 30-in-1 web suite replacing expensive hardware.
posts.description: A mobile-responsive, data-friendly web suite of 30+ tools running entirely in your browser. posts.name: Monologue: Speak & Reflect
posts.tagline: Thought-provoking prompts for daily self-reflection.
posts.description: Monologue is a voice-based reflection app designed to help you slow down, clear your mind, and create more space for yourself during the day. With guided monologues, short warmup sessions, and simple daily reflection tools, Monologue offers a calm and focused way to check in with yourself. Whether you want to organize your thoughts, pause after a long day, or build a more intentional routine, the experience is designed to feel simple, private, and easy to return to.

posts.name: Document.Bot - EU/ Offline AI workspace
posts.tagline: ChatGPT for entire document folders, PDF, Doc, Excel
posts.description: ChatGPT is great for one file. It gets messy when the answer is buried across PDFs, Word docs, spreadsheets, notes, and sensitive client files. Document.Bot runs on your Mac/ PC, indexes a local folder, helps you find related sources, inspect citations, and draft reports or proposals without uploading files one by one. Offline and EU AI model options available, for EU GPDR and AI Act compliance workflows.

posts.name: MentorSpace
posts.tagline: Your AI mentor with a personalized 90-day roadmap
posts.description: Most people have a dream goal but no real plan to get there. MentorSpace fixes that. Tell it your goal, background, and where you're starting from, and it builds a personalized 90-day roadmap for you, week by week. Then your AI mentor stays with you the whole way, answering questions, keeping you on track, and adjusting as you grow. It's not another chatbot. It's the mentor most of us never had but always needed.

posts.name: QuietDash
posts.tagline: Your day on a calm e-ink screen, not your phone
posts.description: Bring your own e-ink screen. QuietDash runs on any Waveshare panel and a Raspberry Pi you already own, so there's no proprietary device to buy and nothing to import. It renders your dashboard (tasks, calendar, a focus timer, fitness rings) to a crisp 1-bit image and the Pi just displays it. No backlight, no notifications. It runs on your own network, so your data stays home. Open source, made in Europe. My phone unlocks dropped from about 60 a day to 15.

posts.name: TabDock
posts.tagline: Smart tab sessions manager
posts.description: Save, park, restore, and organize browser sessions with ease. TabDock is a lightweight and powerful Chrome extension that helps you manage browser tabs like a pro. Instead of keeping 30–100 tabs open and losing control, TabDock lets you “park” your tabs into saved sessions and restore them anytime.

posts.name: Apperture Photography
posts.tagline: See your mistakes before you shoot them
posts.description: Film is expensive. Apperture is a smartphone camera app that helps film photographers meter their shots more precisely and more intuitively, by showing a preview of their photo. Apperture captures all of your mistakes, over exposure, under exposure, motion blur on over 30 real filmstock approximations. Keep track of which camera is loaded with which film, and all of your prototype images. Not interested in paying for premium? Send us a roll of film instead.

posts.name: BackDrop_
posts.tagline: Ghost video overlay — watch anything while you work
posts.description: I kept pausing the same anime episode to get back to work. So I built BackDrop_. It plays any local video (MP4, MKV, AVI, MOV, TS) as a transparent overlay on your full Windows desktop. Opacity from 0–100%, mouse clicks and keyboard pass through to whatever's underneath. No cloud. No account. Files stay on your drive. One-time payment. Works for anime while coding, news overlays for traders, or ambient video while studying.

posts.name: Open-source Notion alternative.

Get 50% off your first premium year natively when you beat Level 1 during our launch week!

We built a probability engine around all of it — 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations, a What-If bracket engine, and a live Wildcard Race tracker. Free on iOS & soon on Android. Utilizing a strict BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) architecture, it grounds LLMs (Gemini, OpenAI, DeepSeek) directly into your live database to capture context-rich user feedback and structure objection logs without third-party SaaS middlemen or hidden API markups.

Swipe right to KEEP, swipe left to TRASH, and use spacebar for a quick 100% focus check. It's completely free, open-source, and 100% local-first. Stop waiting for Lightroom!

If you earned it, you deserve it.

Built with Next.js 15 + SQLite via WebAssembly. All queries run client-side. Open source on GitHub.
